name: speakup
description: AI Copilot for on-chain shareholder governance. Give every on-chain shareholder a voice.

scripts.deploy:robinhood: cd packages/contracts && ROBINHOOD_RPC_URL=${ROBINHOOD_RPC_URL:-https://rpc.testnet.chain.robinhood.com} forge script script/Deploy.s.sol --rpc-url robinhood_testnet --broadcast --verify
scripts.deploy:sepolia: cd packages/contracts && ARBITRUM_SEPOLIA_RPC_URL=${ARBITRUM_SEPOLIA_RPC_URL:-https://sepolia-rollup.arbitrum.io/rpc} forge script script/Deploy.s.sol --rpc-url arbitrum_sepolia --broadcast
scripts.bootstrap:robinhood: cd packages/contracts && ROBINHOOD_RPC_URL=${ROBINHOOD_RPC_URL:-https://rpc.testnet.chain.robinhood.com} forge script script/Bootstrap.s.sol --rpc-url robinhood_testnet --broadcast
scripts.relayer:robinhood: cd packages/agent && ROBINHOOD_RPC_URL=${ROBINHOOD_RPC_URL:-https://rpc.testnet.chain.robinhood.com} ROBINHOOD_CHAIN_ID=46630 bun run scripts/mock-relayer.ts
